# Stack

<!-- Generated by `go generate ./...` (tools/docgen). Do not edit by hand. -->

Client-side stacked PRs.

`stack` manages **stacked pull requests** entirely client-side — no backend server. The branch DAG is synced across teammates by embedding it as a hidden comment in each PR description.

## Get started

- **[Cheat sheet](cheatsheet.md)** — one-page quick reference and workflow recipes.
- **[Command reference](commands.md)** — every command, flag, and default.

## Install

```sh
go build -o stack .
```

## Quickstart

```sh
stack start feature-a      # branch off the trunk and track it
# ...commit work...
stack start feature-b      # stack feature-b on feature-a
# ...commit work...

export STACK_TOKEN=$(gh auth token)
stack submit --owner ORG --repo REPO   # push the stack and open PRs
```
